509.reason: [错误：条件判断逻辑有误。当遇到函数定义（如 "int fuc1()"）时，tokens.get(index+1) 是函数名（IDENFR），tokens.get(index+2) 是 '('（LPARENT），条件为 true，会错误地进入 Decl 分析，导致解析失败。应使用更准确的预读逻辑来判断是否为 Decl。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [错误：条件判断逻辑有误。当遇到函数定义（如 "int fuc1()"）时，tokens.get(index+1) 是函数名（IDENFR），tokens.get(index+2) 是 '('（LPARENT），条件为 true，会错误地进入 Decl 分析，导致解析失败。应使用更准确的预读逻辑来判断是否为 Decl。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：条件判断逻辑有误。当遇到函数定义时，例如 "int fuc1()"，此时 tokens.get(index) 是 "int"，tokens.get(index+1) 是 "fuc1"，tokens.get(index+2) 是 "("，条件 tokens.get(index+2).getType() != TokenType.LPARENT 为 false，导致循环提前退出，无法正确解析全局变量声明。应该使用更准确的预读逻辑来判断是 Decl 还是 FuncDef。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: No bounds check for index+1 and index+2; may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when token list is empty or insufficient tokens. Also, condition logic is incorrect for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误: 使用固定偏移索引，可能越界；且条件逻辑错误，无法正确区分Decl和FuncDef]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing index+1 and index+2 without checking bounds. If the token list is short or ends unexpectedly, this crashes the program, resulting in no output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing index+1 and index+2 without checking if they are within bounds of the tokens list. If the parser reaches the end of the token list or near the end during lookahead, this will crash the program, resulting in no output.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: accessing tokens.get(index + 1) and tokens.get(index + 2) without checking if index + 1 or index + 2 are within the tokens list size, which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when parsing near the end of input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(index + 1) and tokens.get(index + 2) without checking if index+1 or index+2 is within bounds may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException, leading to program crash and no output file]

515.reason: [错误：条件判断逻辑有误。当遇到主函数定义时，例如 "int main()"，此时 tokens.get(index) 是 "int"，tokens.get(index+1) 是 "main"，条件 tokens.get(index+1).getType() != TokenType.MAINTK 为 false，循环退出，但此时 index 可能还未指向 "main"，导致后续 mainFuncDef() 解析时 curToken 不是 "main"，从而出错。应该在循环中先解析 FuncDef，再判断是否为主函数。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：条件判断逻辑有误。当遇到主函数定义时，例如 "int main()"，此时 tokens.get(index) 是 "int"，tokens.get(index+1) 是 "main"，条件 tokens.get(index+1).getType() != TokenType.MAINTK 为 false，循环退出，但此时 index 可能还未指向 "main"，导致后续 mainFuncDef() 解析时 curToken 不是 "main"，从而出错。应该在循环中先解析 FuncDef，再判断是否为主函数。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: No bounds check for index+1; may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, the loop may not terminate correctly if no MainFuncDef is present.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误: 同样可能越界；该循环会误把MainFuncDef之前的任何非main函数都当做FuncDef，但条件不充分，可能导致死循环或错误解析]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing index+1 without checking bounds. If the current token is the last one, this crashes the program.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing index+1 without bounds check. If the token list is exhausted or malformed, this will crash.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: accessing tokens.get(index + 1) without checking if index + 1 is within the tokens list size, which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when parsing near the end of input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(index + 1) without checking if index+1 is within bounds may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when reaching end of token list]
